info.title: Microsoft.DataApiBuilder
info.description: Data API builder for Azure Databases provides modern REST and GraphQL endpoints to your Azure Databases.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add a new entity to the configuration file.

options.name: --source
options.description: Required. Name of the source database object.

options.name: --permissions
options.description:
Required. Permissions required to access the
source table or container.

options.name: --source.type
options.description:
Type of the database object.Must be one of:
[table, view, stored-procedure]

options.name: --source.params
options.description:
Dictionary of parameters and their values for
Source object."param1:val1,param2:value2,.."

options.name: --source.key-fields
options.description: The field(s) to be used as primary keys.

options.name: --rest
options.description: Route for rest api.

options.name: --rest.methods
options.description:
HTTP actions to be supported for stored procedure.
Specify the actions as a comma separated list.
Valid HTTP actions are : [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH,
DELETE]

options.name: --graphql
options.description: Type of graphQL.

options.name: --graphql.operation
options.description:
GraphQL operation to be supported for stored
procedure. Valid operations are : [Query,
Mutation]

options.name: --fields.include
options.description: Fields that are allowed access to permission.

options.name: --fields.exclude
options.description: Fields that are excluded from the action lists.

options.name: --policy-request
options.description:
Specify the rule to be checked before sending any
request to the database.

options.name: --policy-database
options.description:
Specify an OData style filter rule that will be
injected in the query sent to the database.

options.name: --cache.enabled
options.description:
Specify if caching is enabled for Entity, default
value is false.

options.name: --cache.ttl
options.description:
Specify time to live in seconds for cache entries
for Entity.

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of the entity.

options.name: --parameters.name
options.description:
Comma-separated list of parameter names for stored
procedure.

options.name: --parameters.description
options.description:
Comma-separated list of parameter descriptions for
stored procedure.

options.name: --parameters.required
options.description:
Comma-separated list of parameter required flags
(true/false) for stored procedure.

options.name: --parameters.default
options.description:
Comma-separated list of parameter default values
for stored procedure.

options.name: --fields.name
options.description: Name of the database column to expose as a field.

options.name: --fields.alias
options.description: Alias for the field.

options.name: --fields.description
options.description: Description for the field.

options.name: --fields.primary-key
options.description: Set this field as a primary key.

options.name: --mcp.dml-tools
options.description:
Enable MCP DML (Data Manipulation Language) tools
for this entity. Allows CRUD operations via MCP.
Default value is true.

options.name: --mcp.custom-tool
options.description:
Enable MCP custom tool for this entity. Only valid
for stored procedures. Default value is false.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to config file. Defaults to 'dab-config.json'
unless 'dab-config.<DAB_ENVIRONMENT>.json' exists,
where DAB_ENVIRONMENT is an environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: add-telemetry
commands.description: Add telemetry for Data Api builder Application

options.name: --app-insights-conn-string
options.description:
Connection string for the Application Insights
resource for telemetry data

options.name: --app-insights-enabled
options.description:
(Default: False) (Default: false) Enable/Disable
Application Insights

options.name: --otel-endpoint
options.description: Endpoint for Open Telemetry for telemetry data

options.name: --otel-enabled
options.description:
(Default: False) (Default: false) Enable/Disable
OTEL

options.name: --otel-headers
options.description: Headers for Open Telemetry for telemetry data

options.name: --otel-protocol
options.description:
(Default: Grpc) (Default: grpc) Accepted:
grpc/httpprotobuf

options.name: --otel-service-name
options.description:
(Default: dab) (Default: dab) Headers for Open
Telemetry for telemetry data

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to config file. Defaults to
'dab-config.json' unless
'dab-config.<DAB_ENVIRONMENT>.json' exists,
where DAB_ENVIRONMENT is an environment
variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --patterns.include
options.description:
T-SQL LIKE pattern(s) to include database
objects. Space-separated array of patterns.
Default: '%.%'.

options.name: --patterns.exclude
options.description:
T-SQL LIKE pattern(s) to exclude database
Default: null

options.name: --patterns.name
options.description:
Interpolation syntax for entity naming (must
be unique for each generated entity). Default:
'{object}'

options.name: --template.mcp.dml-tool
options.description:
Enable/disable DML tools for generated
entities. Allowed values: true, false.
Default: true

options.name: --template.rest.enabled
options.description: Enable/disable REST endpoint for generated

options.name: --template.graphql.enabled
options.description: Enable/disable GraphQL endpoint for generated

options.name: --template.cache.enabled
options.description:
Enable/disable cache for generated entities.
Allowed values: true, false. Default: false

options.name: --template.cache.ttl-seconds
options.description:
Cache time-to-live in seconds for generated
entities. Default: null

options.name: --template.cache.level
options.description:
Cache level for generated entities. Allowed
values: L1, L1L2. Default: L1L2

options.name: --template.health.enabled
options.description: Enable/disable health check for generated

options.name: --permissions
options.description:
Permissions for generated entities in the
format role:actions (e.g., anonymous:read).

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to config file. Defaults to
'dab-config.json' unless
'dab-config.<DAB_ENVIRONMENT>.json' exists,
where DAB_ENVIRONMENT is an environment
variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

arguments.name: value
arguments.description:
Name of the autoentities definition
to configure.

commands.name: auto-config-simulate
commands.description:
Simulate autoentities generation by querying the
database and displaying the results.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to output CSV file. If not specified, results are printed
to the console.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to config file. Defaults to 'dab-config.json' unless
'dab-config.<DAB_ENVIRONMENT>.json' exists, where
DAB_ENVIRONMENT is an environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: configure
commands.description:
to be
exposed in
the
initialize
response.
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.enabled                                   Enable DAB's
MCP DML
tools
endpoint.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.describe-entities.enabled                 Enable DAB's
MCP describe
entities
tool.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.create-record.enabled                     Enable DAB's
MCP create
record tool.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.read-records.enabled                      Enable DAB's
MCP read
record tool.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.update-record.enabled                     Enable DAB's
MCP update
record tool.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.delete-record.enabled                     Enable DAB's
MCP delete
record tool.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.execute-entity.enabled                    Enable DAB's
MCP execute
entity tool.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.aggregate-records.enabled                 Enable DAB's
MCP
aggregate
records
tool.
Default:
true
(boolean).
--runtime.mcp.dml-tools.aggregate-records.query-timeout           Set the
execution
timeout in
seconds for
the
aggregate-re
cords MCP
tool.
Default: 30
(integer).
Range:
1-600.
--runtime.cache.enabled                                           Enable DAB's
cache
globally.
(You must
also enable
each
entity's
cache
separately.)
. Default:
false
(boolean).
--runtime.cache.ttl-seconds                                       Customize
the DAB
cache's
global
default time
to live in
seconds.
Default: 5
seconds
(Integer).
--runtime.compression.level                                       Set the
response
compression
level.
Allowed
values:
optimal
(default),
fastest,
none.
--runtime.host.mode                                               Set the host
running mode
of DAB in
Development
or
Production.
Default:
Development.
--runtime.host.cors.origins                                       Overwrite
Allowed
Origins in
CORS.
Default: []
(Space
separated
array of
strings).
--runtime.host.cors.allow-credentials                             Set value
for
Access-Contr
ol-Allow-Cre
dentials
header in
Host.Cors.
Default:
false
(boolean).
--runtime.host.authentication.provider                            Configure
the name of
authenticati
on provider.
Default:
Unauthentica
ted.
--runtime.host.authentication.jwt.audience                        Configure
the intended
recipient(s)
of the Jwt
Token.
--runtime.host.authentication.jwt.issuer                          Configure
the entity
that issued
the Jwt
Token.
--azure-key-vault.endpoint                                        Configure
the Azure
Key Vault
endpoint
URL.
--azure-key-vault.retry-policy.mode                               Configure
the retry
policy mode.
Allowed
values:
fixed,
exponential.
Default:
exponential.
--azure-key-vault.retry-policy.max-count                          Configure
the maximum
number of
retry
attempts.
Default: 3.
--azure-key-vault.retry-policy.delay-seconds                      Configure
the initial
delay
between
retries in
seconds.
Default: 1.
--azure-key-vault.retry-policy.max-delay-seconds                  Configure
the maximum
delay
between
retries in
seconds (for
exponential
mode).
Default: 60.
--azure-key-vault.retry-policy.network-timeout-seconds            Configure
the network
timeout for
requests in
seconds.
Default: 60.
--runtime.telemetry.azure-log-analytics.enabled                   Enable/Disab
le Azure Log
Analytics.
Default:
False
(boolean)
--runtime.telemetry.azure-log-analytics.dab-identifier            Configure
DAB
Identifier
to allow
user to
differentiat
e which logs
come from
DAB in Azure
Log
Analytics .
Default:
DABLogs
--runtime.telemetry.azure-log-analytics.flush-interval-seconds    Configure
Flush
Interval in
seconds for
Azure Log
Analytics to
specify the
time
interval to
send the
telemetry
data.
Default: 5
--runtime.telemetry.azure-log-analytics.auth.custom-table-name    Configure
Custom Table
Name for
Azure Log
Analytics
used to find
table to
connect
--runtime.telemetry.azure-log-analytics.auth.dcr-immutable-id     Configure
DCR
Immutable ID
for Azure
Log
Analytics to
find the
data
collection
rule that
defines how
data is
collected
--runtime.telemetry.azure-log-analytics.auth.dce-endpoint         Configure
DCE Endpoint
for Azure
Log
Analytics to
find table
to send
telemetry
data
--runtime.telemetry.file.enabled                                  Enable/Disab
le File Sink
logging.
Default:
False
(boolean)
--runtime.telemetry.file.path                                     Configure
path for
File Sink
logging.
Default:
/logs/dab-lo
g.txt
--runtime.telemetry.file.rolling-interval                         Configure
rolling
interval for
File Sink
logging.
Default: Day
--runtime.telemetry.file.retained-file-count-limit                Configure
maximum
number of
retained
files.
Default: 1
--runtime.telemetry.file.file-size-limit-bytes                    Configure
maximum file
size limit
in bytes.
Default:
1048576
--show-effective-permissions                                      Display
effective
permissions
for all
entities,
including
inherited
permissions.
Entities are
listed in
alphabetical
order.
-c, --config                                                      Path to
config file.
Defaults to
'dab-config.
json' unless
'dab-config.
<DAB_ENVIRON
MENT>.json'
exists,
where
DAB_ENVIRONM
ENT is an
environment
variable.
--help                                                            Display this
help screen.
--version                                                         Display
version
information.

options.name: --data-source.database-type
options.description:
Database
type.
Allowed

commands.name: export
commands.description:
Export the GraphQL schema as a file and save it to
disk.

options.name: --graphql
options.description: Export GraphQL schema

options.name: --output
options.description:
Required. Specify the directory where the
schema file will be saved. This option is
required.

options.name: --graphql-schema-file
options.description:
Specify the filename for the exported GraphQL
schema.(Default is:'schema.gql').

options.name: --generate
options.description:
Generates a schema file from the specified
Azure Cosmos DB database.

options.name: --sampling-mode
options.description: Specifies the sampling mode to use. Available

options.name: --database-type
options.description:
Required. Type of database to
connect. Supported values: mssql,
cosmosdb_nosql, cosmosdb_postgresql,
mysql, postgresql, dwsql

options.name: --connection-string
options.description:
(Default: '') Connection details to
connect to the database.

options.name: --cosmosdb_nosql-database
options.description:
Database name for Azure Cosmos DB for
NoSql.

options.name: --cosmosdb_nosql-container
options.description:
Container name for Azure Cosmos DB
for NoSql.

options.name: --graphql-schema
options.description: GraphQL schema Path.

options.name: --set-session-context
options.description:
(Default: false) Enable sending data
to MsSql using session context.

options.name: --host-mode
options.description:
(Default: Production) Specify the
Host mode - Development or Production

options.name: --cors-origin
options.description: Specify the list of allowed origins.

options.name: --auth.provider
options.description:
(Default: Unauthenticated) Specify
the Identity Provider.

options.name: --auth.audience
options.description:
Identifies the recipients that the
JWT is intended for.

options.name: --auth.issuer
options.description:
Specify the party that issued the jwt
token.

options.name: --rest.path
options.description:
(Default: /api) Specify the REST
endpoint's default prefix.

options.name: --runtime.base-route
options.description:
Specifies the base route for API
requests.

options.name: --rest.disabled
options.description:
(Default: false) Disables REST
endpoint for all entities.

options.name: --graphql.path
options.description:
(Default: /graphql) Specify the
GraphQL endpoint's default prefix.

options.name: --graphql.disabled
options.description: (Default: false) Disables GraphQL

options.name: --mcp.path
options.description: (Default: /mcp) Specify the MCP

options.name: --mcp.disabled
options.description: (Default: false) Disables MCP

options.name: --rest.enabled
--graphql.enabled
options.description:
(Default: true) Enables GraphQL
endpoint for all entities. Supported
values: true, false.

options.name: --mcp.enabled
options.description: (Default: true) Enables MCP endpoint

options.name: --rest.request-body-strict
options.description:
(Default: false) When true, rejects
extraneous/unmapped fields in the
REST request body. When false, allows
and ignores them.

options.name: --graphql.multiple-create.enabled
options.description:
(Default: false) Enables multiple
create operation for GraphQL.
Supported values: true, false.

options.name: --mcp.aggregate-records.query-timeout
options.description:
Set the execution timeout in seconds
for the aggregate-records MCP tool.
Default: 30 (integer). Range: 1-600.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to config file. Defaults to
'dab-config.json' unless
'dab-config.<DAB_ENVIRONMENT>.json'
exists, where DAB_ENVIRONMENT is an
environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Specifies logging level as informational.

options.name: --LogLevel
options.description:
Specifies logging level as provided value. For possible
values, see:
https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2263106

options.name: --no-https-redirect
options.description: Disables automatic https redirects.

options.name: --mcp-stdio
options.description:
Run Data API Builder in MCP stdio mode while starting
the engine.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to config file. Defaults to 'dab-config.json'
unless 'dab-config.<DAB_ENVIRONMENT>.json' exists,
where DAB_ENVIRONMENT is an environment variable.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

arguments.name: role
arguments.description:
Optional MCP permissions role, e.g. role:anonymous. If
omitted, defaults to anonymous.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Update an existing entity in the configuration file.

options.name: --source
options.description: Name of the source table or container.

options.name: --permissions
options.description:
Permissions required to access the source table or
container.

options.name: --relationship
options.description: Specify relationship between two entities.

options.name: --cardinality
options.description: Specify cardinality between two entities.

options.name: --target.entity
options.description:
Another exposed entity to which the source entity
relates to.

options.name: --linking.object
options.description:
Database object that is used to support an M:N
relationship.

options.name: --linking.source.fields
options.description:
Database fields in the linking object to connect
to the related item in the source entity.

options.name: --linking.target.fields
options.description:
Database fields in the linking object to connect
to the related item in the target entity.

options.name: --relationship.fields
options.description:
Specify fields to be used for mapping the
entities.

options.name: --map
options.description:
Specify mappings between database fields and
GraphQL and REST fields. format: --map
"backendName1:exposedName1,backendName2:exposedNam
e2,...".

options.name: --source.type
options.description:
Type of the database object.Must be one of:
[table, view, stored-procedure]

options.name: --source.params
options.description:
Dictionary of parameters and their values for
Source object."param1:val1,param2:value2,.."

options.name: --source.key-fields
options.description: The field(s) to be used as primary keys.

options.name: --rest
options.description: Route for rest api.

options.name: --rest.methods
options.description:
HTTP actions to be supported for stored procedure.
Specify the actions as a comma separated list.
Valid HTTP actions are : [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH,
DELETE]

options.name: --graphql
options.description: Type of graphQL.

options.name: --graphql.operation
options.description:

procedure. Valid operations are : [Query,

options.name: --fields.include
options.description: Fields that are allowed access to permission.

options.description: Fields that are excluded from the action lists.

options.description:
Specify the rule to be checked before sending any
request to the database.

options.name: --policy-database
options.description:
Specify an OData style filter rule that will be
injected in the query sent to the database.

options.name: --cache.enabled
options.description:
Specify if caching is enabled for Entity, default

options.name: --cache.ttl
options.description:

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of the entity.

options.name: --parameters.name
options.description:
Comma-separated list of parameter names for stored

options.name: --parameters.description
options.description:
Comma-separated list of parameter descriptions for

options.description:
Comma-separated list of parameter required flags

options.name: --fields.alias
options.description: Alias for the field.

options.name: --fields.description
options.description: Description for the field.

options.name: --fields.primary-key
options.description: Set this field as a primary key.

options.name: --mcp.dml-tools
options.description:
Enable MCP DML (Data Manipulation Language) tools
for this entity. Allows CRUD operations via MCP.
Default value is true.

options.name: --mcp.custom-tool
options.description:
Enable MCP custom tool for this entity. Only valid

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to config file. Defaults to 'dab-config.json'
